headline: The Hidden Engine Behind Elevance Health Stock's Next Climb
summary: Investors are rightly focused on the company's Medicaid struggles, but the real upside story may be hiding in plain sight across the rest of its business.

headline: What Kept Coming Up When Analysts Grilled UNH
summary: UnitedHealth's stock is flying high after it raised guidance, but on its latest earnings call, analysts zeroed in on an underlying margin divergence running right through the business.
